message:
bd-ml2r.2.2: add directed/undirected projection policy

Add DirectedProjectionPolicy enum with four modes (IgnoreDirection,
BidirectionalHalfWeight, BidirectionalFullWeight, PenaltyWeighted)
for projecting directed IR graphs to undirected fnx graphs.

- ProjectionConfig struct with penalty factor, self-loop, and
  parallel edge collapse options
- ProjectionTrace struct for diagnostic surfacing
- ir_to_graph_with_policy() function applying chosen policy
- valid/invalid_diagnostics() methods for policy compatibility checks
- Test coverage for weight application and parallel edge handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
